datasets.name: Resting State -- Eyes Closed
datasets.description: Alpha-dominant resting EEG with eyes closed
datasets.clinical_relevance: Baseline resting state, used for alpha rhythm assessment

datasets.name: Resting State -- Eyes Open
datasets.description: Beta-dominant EEG with alpha suppression during eyes-open resting
datasets.clinical_relevance: Comparison condition for alpha reactivity testing

datasets.name: Motor Imagery -- Left Hand
datasets.description: Event-related desynchronization in right motor cortex (C4) during left hand imagery
datasets.clinical_relevance: BCI control paradigm, motor rehabilitation assessment

datasets.name: Motor Imagery -- Right Hand
datasets.description: Event-related desynchronization in left motor cortex (C3) during right hand imagery
datasets.clinical_relevance: BCI control paradigm, motor rehabilitation assessment

datasets.name: P300 Oddball Paradigm
datasets.description: P300 event-related potential with target (20%) and non-target (80%) stimuli
datasets.clinical_relevance: Cognitive assessment, P300-based BCI speller, attention evaluation

datasets.name: SSVEP at 12Hz
datasets.description: Steady-state visually evoked potential at 12Hz in occipital channels
datasets.clinical_relevance: SSVEP-based BCI paradigm, visual pathway assessment

datasets.name: Sleep Stage N2
datasets.description: NREM stage 2 sleep with sleep spindles (12-14Hz) and K-complexes
datasets.clinical_relevance: Sleep staging, sleep disorder assessment, memory consolidation research

datasets.name: Eye Blink Artifacts
datasets.description: Clean EEG with periodic eye blink artifacts at frontal channels (Fp1, Fp2)
datasets.clinical_relevance: Artifact rejection algorithm testing and validation

datasets.name: Seizure Simulation
datasets.description: Simulated focal-to-generalized epileptiform activity with evolving rhythmic discharges
datasets.clinical_relevance: Seizure detection algorithm testing, epilepsy monitoring development

datasets.name: Meditation -- Theta Enhancement
datasets.description: Enhanced frontal midline theta with intermittent alpha and reduced beta during meditation
datasets.clinical_relevance: Neurofeedback training, mindfulness research, attention studies
